description: Returns NCAP data adoption by passenger-car registration year from 1995: total, NCAP-recorded count, and percentage. Use for NCAP trend or year-share questions. Registry type-approval record, not independent post-registration testing.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= 1995 AND _foerste_registrering_aar <= 2026 | STATS total = COUNT(*), ncap_tested = COUNT(*) WHERE KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningNCAPTest == true BY registration_year = _foerste_registrering_aar | EVAL ncap_pct = ROUND(ncap_tested * 100.0 / total, 1) | SORT registration_year ASC | LIMIT 35
